videos.title: 1 Image + 1 Prompt = 1 Camera Commercial
videos.description:
One camera image, one prompt, and one full AI commercial output with US Video API, powered by Seedance 2.0.

This short shows both the final visual result and the actual prompt structure used to generate a premium camera commercial style output.

PROMPT:
[0-3s] Extreme macro lens close-up of the camera lens. The glass elements reflect cool studio lights. Metallic engravings are razor sharp. A soft blue rim light grazes the edges. The image breathes with depth and texture.

[3-7s] The camera begins a slow orbital move, revealing the top plate and precision dials. Cinematic parallax and soft haze in the background. The lighting sculpts the form with subtle gradients and metallic reflections.

[7-12s] Orbit continues to the rear. The display and controls come into view. Reflections glide across the screen and buttons. The camera feels tactile, premium, and engineered for creators.

[12-15s] Hero push-in to a three-quarter front angle. The lens catches a final highlight as the camera settles in a powerful beauty shot. Perfect product hero composition.

Visual Style: Ultra-realistic, cinematic product commercial. Shallow depth of field, soft haze, controlled highlights, dark moody environment, premium studio lighting.

Generate videos like this:
https://usvideoapi.com

#shorts #usvideoapi #seedance #prompt #aivideo #productvideo #cameraad

videos.title: From 1 Camera Photo to a Cinematic AI Commercial
videos.description:
A single camera image turned into a cinematic AI product commercial with US Video API, powered by Seedance 2.0.

This short demonstrates AI camera product video generation with macro lens detail, orbital camera motion, premium lighting, and a clean hero lockup.

PROMPT:
[0-3s] Extreme macro lens close-up of the camera lens. The glass elements reflect cool studio lights. Metallic engravings are razor sharp. A soft blue rim light grazes the edges. The image breathes with depth and texture.

[3-7s] The camera begins a slow orbital move, revealing the top plate and precision dials. Cinematic parallax and soft haze in the background. The lighting sculpts the form with subtle gradients and metallic reflections.

[7-12s] Orbit continues to the rear. The display and controls come into view. Reflections glide across the screen and buttons. The camera feels tactile, premium, and engineered for creators.

[12-15s] Hero push-in to a three-quarter front angle. The lens catches a final highlight as the camera settles in a powerful beauty shot. Perfect product hero composition.

Visual Style: Ultra-realistic, cinematic product commercial. Shallow depth of field, soft haze, controlled highlights, dark moody environment, premium studio lighting.
